title: For Sama
tmdbOverview: A love letter from a young mother to her daughter, the film tells the story of Waad al-Kateab’s life through five years of the uprising in Aleppo, Syria as she falls in love, gets married and gives birth to Sama, all while cataclysmic conflict rises around her.  Her camera captures incredible stories of loss, laughter and survival as Waad wrestles with an impossible choice– whether or not to flee the city to protect her daughter’s life, when leaving means abandoning the struggle for freedom for which she has already sacrificed so much.
synopsis: Released in 2019, For Sama is a documentary and war film from United States and United Kingdom. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.5 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 16 certification (CH rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
